); } function address({ street, number, complement }) { return [street, number, complement].filter(Boolean).join(", "); } function splitInBlocks(str, size = 4) { if (str == null) return null; const regex = new RegExp(`.{1,${size}}`, "g"); return str.match(regex).join(" "); }
